title: Robin Faces the Navy’s Past — Part 5
description: Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene focuses on Aokiji, Nico Robin, Luffy, Sanji, Zoro. Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't whine! Nico Robin is colder!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I want to fight him alone!!

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: You and me, MAND A MAND!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: cool with me, but be warned...

summary: Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.
